palette.title: field palette
palette.subtitle: Drag items onto the page to place them.

reportDesigner.tableDropHint: Drag from the palette to add a column
reportDesigner.tableSettingsHint: Drag the table columns from the left palette and drop them into this area.

list.title: Report templates
list.noTemplates: No template yet. You can add it with create new.

preview.label: Report template
preview.loadFailed: PDF could not be loaded. Select the template again or refresh the page.
preview.noBoundFields: Template has no bound data fields
preview.noBoundFieldsHint: Apply the V3RII Ready Template in the PDF designer and save, or drag fields from the palette.

inspector.title: controller
inspector.selectHint: Select item or if more than one is selected position/size will not be updated.

layers.title: layers
layers.noItems: No items yet. Drag from Palette.

starter.manualQuotationDescription: Builds a 4-page custom canvas: quotation page, about image page, timeline image page, and a final notes + 3 reference images page. Everything stays editable.
starter.visualBrochureDescription: Creates a 3-page visual deck canvas for cover, about and timeline pages. Upload your reference visuals directly into the full-page image slots.

pdfReportDesigner.title: Title
pdfReportDesigner.deleteTemplateConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This cannot be undone.
pdfReportDesigner.enterDocumentId: Enter document ID (Quotation / Order / Demand ID).
pdfReportDesigner.noTemplates: No templates yet. Use Create New to add one.
pdfReportDesigner.listDescription: The list loads only template headers. Full design data is opened on demand for edit, copy, and PDF generation.
pdfReportDesigner.detailHint: Full design opens in the edit screen
pdfReportDesigner.draftFound: Draft found. You can restore or clear it.

tablePresetManagement.title: Table Preset Library
tablePresetManagement.description: Server-side reusable preset source for builder tables.
tablePresetManagement.noPresetsDescription: Start by creating a new table template.
tablePresetManagement.name: Name
tablePresetManagement.dialogDescription: Edit columns and table settings in JSON format.

pdfReportDesigner.identityHint: Pick a document type and title, then start designing.
pdfReportDesigner.identitySubtitle: These values define the template identity and are used when generating the PDF.

stepper.design: Drag elements from the left panel
stepper.configure: Configure the selected element on the right

pdfReportDesigner.inspectorSelectionEmptyBody: Click an element on the canvas — its settings will appear here.
pdfReportDesigner.inspectorLockHint: This element is locked. Unlock it from the layers panel to edit.
pdfReportDesigner.inspectorHiddenHint: This element is hidden on the canvas preview.

paletteSteps.s1: 1. Drag an item from the left
paletteSteps.s2: 2. Drop it on the A4 page

paletteSectionHints.basicBlocks: Text, cards, containers, notes and totals.
paletteSectionHints.fields: Real data from the document — auto-bound.
paletteSectionHints.tableColumns: Drop onto a table to become a column.
paletteSectionHints.addTable: Place the table first, then drag columns onto it.
paletteSectionHints.exchangeRates: Special columns related to exchange rates.

pdfReportDesigner.canvasEmptyBody: Drag text, fields or a table from the left panel, or apply a ready skeleton via Smart Start from the top bar.
pdfReportDesigner.canvasEmptyStep1: Pick an item from the left
pdfReportDesigner.canvasEmptyStep2: Drop it on the A4 page
pdfReportDesigner.canvasEmptyStep3: Tweak it on the right and save
pdfReportDesigner.canvasPageHint: This will be page {{page}} of the generated PDF
pdfReportDesigner.canvasEmptyRightClickHint: Tip: right-click anywhere on the page to quickly add an element.
pdfReportDesigner.canvasEmptyHint: Canvas is empty. Drag from the left panel or apply a ready layout from above.

layoutPreset.label: Layout type
layoutPreset.customDescription: Build a custom PDF template by placing text, fields, tables and images on the canvas.

pdfReportDesigner.qualitySubtitle: Is this template clear enough for a first-time user?
pdfReportDesigner.qualityReady: The template passed the basic enterprise quality check.

validation.failed: Could not save — required fields are missing or invalid
validation.bannerIntro: Correct the fields marked in red. Drag columns from the left panel onto tables.
validation.tableNoColumns: Table must have at least one column (element {{index}})
validation.tableNoColumnsHint: Drag at least one column from the left panel onto this table.

qualityIssues.title: Template title is missing.
qualityIssues.elements: No element has been placed on the page yet.
qualityIssues.headerFields: At least one bound field should match the document.
qualityIssues.table: The main content table is missing for line-based documents.
qualityIssues.tableColumns: A table exists, but its columns are not defined yet.
qualityIssues.totals: A totals summary block is missing.
qualityIssues.note: There is no note or description area.

pdfReportDesigner.narrativeEmpty: No layout has been prepared yet for the {{documentType}} template. A user would not know what goes where.
pdfReportDesigner.narrativeReady: The {{documentType}} template is currently prepared with {{elementCount}} elements across {{pageCount}} page(s).
pdfReportDesigner.smartStartDescription: Build a safe starting layout without relying on technical drag and drop.
pdfReportDesigner.presetGalleryDescription: Instead of building from scratch, start from one of these safe template patterns.

presetGallery.fieldsNotLoaded: Field list is not loaded yet. Wait a few seconds and try again.
presetGallery.missingFields: Required fields were not found in the API: {{fields}}

pdfReportDesigner.fieldPathsRebound: Template fields were matched to API paths.
pdfReportDesigner.unresolvedFieldPaths: Unresolved fields: {{fields}}, columns: {{columns}}. Drag the correct fields from the palette and save.
pdfReportDesigner.reusableBlocksDescription: Add frequently used document sections with one click.
pdfReportDesigner.visibilityRuleDescription: Show or hide this element based on a field value. The rule is saved with the template.
pdfReportDesigner.visibilityRulePreviewNoField: Pick a field first to see a sample result.
pdfReportDesigner.visibilityRulePreviewIncomplete: The rule is not complete yet.
pdfReportDesigner.visibilityRulePreviewVisible: This element would be visible with the sample value.
pdfReportDesigner.visibilityRulePreviewHidden: This element would be hidden with the sample value.
pdfReportDesigner.conditionalStyleDescription: Apply color, background, or border styling when a field value matches a condition.
